channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [AADHARHFC] Aadhar Housing Promoter Encumbers 65.19% Stake for NHB Refinance
item.description:
Aadhar Housing Finance's promoter, BCP Asia II Holdco VII Pte. Ltd., has created an encumbrance on its entire 65.19% shareholding, totaling 282,788,827 equity shares. This involves a non-disposal undertaking to the National Housing Bank (NHB), effective April 7, 2026. Under this agreement, BCP Asia will not transfer or encumber its shares such that its holding falls below 26% of the total share capital without NHB's prior written permission. This undertaking acts as consideration for refinance assistance availed by Aadhar Housing Finance from NHB for its housing loan operations.

  • Promoter BCP Asia encumbered 65.19% stake in Aadhar Housing Finance.
  • Non-disposal undertaking given to National Housing Bank (NHB).
  • Promoter's holding cannot fall below 26% without NHB's consent.
  • This secures refinance assistance from NHB for housing loans.
  • The encumbrance covers 282,788,827 equity shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [ANMOL] Anmol India clarifies significant price movement to BSE
item.description:
Anmol India Ltd responded to an email from BSE Limited dated April 09, 2026, seeking clarification regarding a significant movement in the price of its securities. The company affirmed its full compliance with Regulation 30 and other applicable provisions of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Anmol India stated that it has consistently and promptly furnished all relevant information to the Stock Exchanges as per the prescribed timelines, confirming its adherence to all disclosure obligations.

  • BSE requested clarification on Anmol India's share price movement.
  • Anmol India confirmed compliance with SEBI LODR Regulation 30.
  • Company stated it promptly provides all required information to exchanges.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anmol India Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [RPPINFRA] RPP Infra clarifies on share price movement, cites market-driven factors
item.description:
R P P Infra Projects Ltd responded to a clarification sought by the BSE regarding significant movement in its equity share price. The company stated that all material information and announcements, including necessary disclosures under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and Insider Trading Regulations, have been duly disclosed within stipulated timelines. RPP Infra further confirmed that there is no pending information or announcement that could impact the company's share price. The company concluded that the recent share price movement appears to be purely market-driven and beyond its control, reiterating its compliance with regulatory requirements.

  • Company responded to BSE query on recent share price volatility.
  • Stated all material information has been duly disclosed as per regulations.
  • Confirmed no pending announcements impacting share price movement.
  • Attributed share price fluctuations to purely market-driven factors.
  • Reiterated compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RPP INFRA PROJECTS LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [GENUSPAPER] Genus Paper clarifies on price movement
item.description:
Genus Paper & Boards Ltd responded to an email from the exchange regarding significant price and volume movement in its shares. The company stated that it has been consistently disseminating all events and information, including price-sensitive information, that could impact its operations or performance, in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Genus Paper & Boards Ltd further clarified that it is unaware of the specific reasons behind the recent significant movement in its security's price/volume. The company assured the exchange that it would continue to provide updates on any price-sensitive information.

  • Genus Paper clarified on unusual price/volume movement.
  • Company asserts compliance with SEBI disclosure norms.
  • Management is unaware of specific reasons for market activity.
  • Pledged to continue disclosing price-sensitive information.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Genus Paper & Boards Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [LANCER] Lancer Container unaware of reason for price movement
item.description:
Lancer Container Lines Ltd has issued a clarification regarding the significant movement observed in its security's price on the Stock Exchange. The company stated that it is not aware of any information, announcement, or pending announcement that could explain the price or volume behavior of its shares. Lancer Container Lines confirmed that it has been regularly disseminating all material information and has complied with the disclosure requirements under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Furthermore, the company assured that there are no material events or developments that have not been disclosed to the Stock Exchange which might impact its securities' price or volume movement.

  • Company received query regarding significant share price movement.
  • Lancer Container is unaware of any undisclosed reasons for the movement.
  • Confirmed compliance with SEBI disclosure regulations.
  • No material events remain undisclosed to the stock exchange.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lancer Container Lines Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [SHRGLTR] Lloyds Enterprises Clarifies Volume Movement
item.description:
Lloyds Enterprises Ltd responded to a query from the stock exchange regarding significant volume movement in its equity shares. The company confirmed that there is no pending information or announcement, as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, that would have a bearing on the price or volume behavior of its scrip. The company stated that the movement is purely market-driven and beyond management's control or knowledge. It reiterated its commitment to regularly disseminating all Unpublished Price Sensitive Information (UPSI) in compliance with regulatory requirements.

  • Lloyds Enterprises clarified unusual share volume movement.
  • Company states no undisclosed information under Regulation 30.
  • Volume movement attributed to purely market-driven factors.
  • Management has no control or knowledge of reasons for volume change.
  • Company confirms adherence to SEBI disclosure regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHREE GLOBAL TRADEFIN LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [OLATECH] Olatech Solutions Clarifies Share Price Movement
item.description:
Olatech Solutions Ltd responded to an inquiry from the stock exchange dated April 9, 2026, regarding the movement in its share price. The company affirmed its compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and committed to disclosing any material information as required. Olatech Solutions clarified that the price movements of its shares are purely market-driven and influenced by general market conditions. The management explicitly stated it has no connection with such price movements.

  • Olatech Solutions responded to a query on its share price movement.
  • Company confirmed compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015.
  • Stated share price movements are purely market-driven.
  • Management denied any connection to the share price fluctuations.
  • No undisclosed material information was reported by the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Olatech Solutions Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [RVHL] Ravinder Heights clarifies significant share price movement
item.description:
Ravinder Heights Ltd received an email from BSE seeking clarification on the significant movement in its share price. The company informed the exchange that it has made all necessary disclosures in a timely and accurate manner, complying with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Ravinder Heights stated there is no undisclosed or price-sensitive information, nor any impending announcement or corporate action that needs to be reported. The company concluded that the recent price movement is purely market-driven and beyond its control.

  • BSE sought clarification on recent significant share price movement.
  • Company confirms timely and accurate disclosures under Regulation 30.
  • No undisclosed price-sensitive information or corporate action exists.
  • Ravinder Heights attributes share price movement to market forces.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ravinder Heights Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [MBEL] M&B Engineering clarifies share price movement to BSE
item.description:
M&B Engineering Ltd responded to a clarification request from BSE regarding recent movements in its share price. The company stated that all material and price-sensitive information, as per SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, has been disclosed within the stipulated time. M&B Engineering confirmed that there is no pending information or announcement from the company that could influence the scrip's price behavior. The company attributed the share price movement purely to market conditions, asserting that it is market-driven and the management is not connected with any such price fluctuations.

  • M&B Engineering responded to BSE's query on share price movement.
  • Company confirms timely disclosure of all material information.
  • No pending announcements to influence the scrip's price.
  • Share price movement attributed solely to market conditions.
  • Management denies any connection to price fluctuations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: M & B Engineering Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [ATL] Allcargo Terminals clarifies price movement, cites market conditions
item.description:
Allcargo Terminals Ltd responded to BSE's query regarding unusual price and volume movement in its shares. The company stated that it has consistently disclosed all material and price-sensitive information as per SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. It affirmed that no material information or events that could impact the scrip's price/volume behavior have been withheld. The company attributed the spurt in its share price and volume to market conditions, stating it has no control over or knowledge of the reasons behind such market-driven movements.

  • Allcargo Terminals responded to BSE's query on share price movement.
  • Company confirms all material and price-sensitive information disclosed.
  • No undisclosed information exists that could affect share price/volume.
  • Price and volume spurt is attributed to market conditions.
  • Company has no control or knowledge over market-driven movements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Allcargo Terminals Ltd | Category: Clarification
